query:
-- Check all services for Mount Cotton Medical Centre (C0166) and their assignments
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.serviceType,
  sba.billingItemExternalId,
  bi.description, bi.lineAmount
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0166'
ORDER BY s.externalId;

  sba.billingItemExternalId,
  bi.description, bi.lineAmount
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0166'
ORDER BY s.externalId;
